demo.tagline: Elevate Your Development Experience with This Cutting-Edge Boilerplate Project Template

solutions.title: Ready to Use
solutions.content: Offers a plug-and-play solution for web client-side development, ensuring quick project kickoffs.

solutions.title: Standardized
solutions.content: Focused on standardized, organized, and structured. Simplifies the development process, enhancing efficiency and maintainability.

solutions.title: Continously Updated
solutions.content: Continuously striving to stay updated. Designed to accommodate evolving industry trends and open to any feedback.

solutions.title: For any Web Purpose
solutions.content: Can be used for Various Web Client Side Applications: Single Page Applications (SPAs), E-commerce Sites, Dashboards, and More.

solutions.title: Coverage Common Needs
solutions.content: Ensures Comprehensive Coverage of Fundamental and Common Needs in on Web Development Process.

demo.typography_detail: This boilerplate offers its own typography styling, designed to be standardized and easily to customize in <0>src/index.css</0>. This guideline is inspired by Material UI 2.
demo.storage_subtitle:
Basic configuration for handling local and session storage.
Take a look in <0>src/services/storage/index.ts.
demo.storage_local: Yes, I will remember it even if you comeback tomorrow.
demo.events_detail:
Empowering the components to interact with each other based on the topics they listen to. This concept is inspired by Kafka and Quasar Event Bus.
Take a look in <0>src/providers/events.provider.tsx && src/views/pages/example/Example.tsx.
demo.axios_detail: Simplified code pattern to handle actions on response and on request from fetching API. Take a look in <0>src/services/axios && src/api</0>
demo.cta_detail: Currently this boilerplate is open source. It means you can contribute by opening a feature request, enhancement or anything else that makes this boilerplate better than before.
